column1: This file was created using the 202602 CRSP database.
It contains value- and equal-weighted returns for portfolios formed on VAR.
The portfolios are constructed at the end of each month.
The total return variance is measured over 60 days up to formation month-end requiring at least 20 non-missing daily returns.
Annual returns are from January to December.
Missing data are indicated by -99.99 or -999.
The break points include utilities and include financials.
The  portfolios  include utilities and include financials.
Value Weighted Returns -- Annual from January to December
Equal Weighted Returns -- Annual from January to December
Value-Weighted Average of Past Return Variance
